resources.string: LSPosed module for Bilibili. Enable it in LSPosed and select the tv.danmaku.bili scope.

Important: on the first Bilibili launch after enabling this module, use a Chinese VPN. If you open it without the VPN first, Bilibili may hide the categories and they usually return only after clearing the app data.
I do not have a stable income and I build this for fun in my free time. If this module helps you, any support keeps the project alive and means a lot.
